summary: Completed UI redesign testing for SwarmSim cyberpunk dark theme. All 14 features verified working: dark background (#06080f), cyan accents (#00f5c4), glassmorphism cards with backdrop-filter blur(8px), Space Mono/Space Grotesk/Syne fonts, canvas particle background, grid overlay, 5-step indicators, 4 stat cells, upload dropzone, mode toggle, prediction textarea, Live Intelligence fields (topic, horizon pills, custom question), 4 info cards sidebar, cost estimate card, ticker bar, System Online badge, and New Simulation button.
passed_tests: Homepage renders with dark background (#06080f / rgb(6, 8, 15))
Cyan accent color (#00f5c4) applied to 41+ elements
Glassmorphism header with backdrop-filter blur
Steps bar shows 5 step indicators (01-05) with labels: Upload Seed, Generate Agents, Simulate, Report, Interact
Stats row displays 4 stat cells: 1,247 Simulations Run, 38K Agents Deployed, 892 Predictions Made, 78% Accuracy Rate
Upload zone (dropzone) is clickable with glassmorphism card styling
Mode toggle between Document Upload and Live Intelligence works - tabs become active on click
Prediction question textarea renders and accepts input
Live Intelligence mode shows topic input field
Live Intelligence mode shows 6 horizon pills (Next 24 hours, Next week, Next month, Next 3 months, Next 6 months, Long term)
Live Intelligence mode shows custom question field
Info cards sidebar shows 4 cards: AI Knowledge Extraction, Agent Swarm Generated, Multi-Round Simulation, Prediction Report
Cost estimate card displays in sidebar with cost bar visualization (~$0.05 for 10 agents · 3 rounds)
Ticker bar visible at bottom with 5 items: NIFTY, BTC, SENSEX, Sessions today, Engine Online
System Online badge in header with pulsing dot animation
New Simulation button visible in header
Backend health check at /api/health returns 200 OK
Session creation at /api/sessions POST returns session_id UUID
Canvas particle background element exists (#bg-canvas)
Grid overlay element exists (.grid-overlay)
Space Grotesk font applied to body
Syne font applied to headings (H1)
Space Mono font applied to monospace elements
Header has sticky positioning
Terminal/log box present for system dashboard
Content grid layout with sidebar working
Extract Knowledge Graph button correctly disabled when no file/query
Fetch & Analyze button correctly enabled when topic is filled
Step indicators show correct opacity (0.4) for non-clickable steps
critical_code_review_comments: UI redesign successfully implemented with cyberpunk dark theme
All CSS design tokens properly defined in :root (--bg, --cyan, --text, etc.)
Glassmorphism effects working with backdrop-filter: blur(8px)
Animations defined: fadeUp, pulse-dot, scan, float, gradient-shift, shimmer, slide-up, fade-in, glow-pulse
Responsive grid layout with content-grid class
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Font imports from Google Fonts working correctly

success_rate.backend: 100% (2/2 endpoints tested - health and session creation)

context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign complete and verified. All cyberpunk dark theme elements working: dark background, cyan accents, glassmorphism, custom fonts, particle background, grid overlay, and new layout with stats row, info sidebar, and ticker bar. No issues found.

rca_of_the_issue.verification: Verified via Playwright UI tests and API calls
